input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.7.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.7.4
            TITLE: the anti submarine belts must attach by one of the three:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.7.4: The Anti Submarine Belts must attach by one of the three:
T.2.7.4 The Anti Submarine Belts must attach by one of the three: 
a. Bolt or eyebolt through a welded tube insert or tested monocoque attachment  F.7.9 
b. Bolt or clip to a tab or bracket ( T.2.4.3 ) on a tube frame
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 62 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
c. Wrap around a tube meeting F.3.2.1.j that connects the Lower Side Impact tubes F.6.4.5.  
The belt must not be able to touch the ground.

final_answer:
The Anti Submarine Belts must attach by one of the three:
a. Bolt or eyebolt through a welded tube insert or tested monocoque attachment F.7.9
b. Bolt or clip to a tab or bracket ( T.2.4.3 ) on a tube frame
c. Wrap around a tube meeting F.3.2.1.j that connects the Lower Side Impact tubes F.6.4.5.
The belt must not be able to touch the ground.
